feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to create dynamic graphic images in adobe forms sap abap
entry.content: I want to create a chart graph and pie chart in Adobe Forms with dynamically incoming data as in the example below. I tried to print a chart created with CL_GUI_CHART_ENGINE to Adobe Forms. Has anyone done this before?

entry.title: INSERT FROM SELECT - The expression that contains "BUKRS" can get null values since it contains...
entry.content:
Hello,

I've got this ABAP syntax check warning for all key fields of ZTABLE (BUKRS, etc.) of below ABAP code:

The expression that contains "BUKRS" can get null values since it contains fields that were not created with "Initial Values" in the dictionary.

Syntax check internal message code: INSERT 211.

ABAP code (there's a list of columns and a WHERE clause with IN and = followed by ABAP variables, no SQL expression):

INSERT ztable FROM ( SELECT bukrs, ... FROM zcview ).

BUKRS is the first key field of ZTABLE. ZTABLE has a client key field in the very first position.

ZCVIEW is a CDS entity view with this code (only inner join, no left outer join):

define view entity ZCVIEW
  as select from bkpf
  inner join ...
{
  key bkpf.bukrs,
  ...
  sum( ... ) as sum_...,
  ...
  cast(' ' as belnr_d) as extbelnr,
  ...
}
where ... // conditions against constants
group by ... // all fields before the sum fields

The description says to use ##NULL_VALUES to remove the warning. This works fine.

I'd like to know the reason why there is this warning.

I see in the ABAP documentation INSERT dbtab, source - Alternative 3 ( SELECT subquery_clauses ... ):

Null values to be inserted can be produced in the following cases:

  • As results of outer joins in the FORM clause of the subquery.
  • As results of SQL expressions in the SELECT list of the subquery.
  • If a field read by the subquery already contains a null value.

A catchable exception of exception class CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB is raised in the case of columns that are key fields of the DDIC database table or DDIC view to be filled. If it is known statically that null values can be inserted into key fields, a syntax check warning that can be hidden by the pragma null_values is produced.

There is no reason that NULL values can be inserted in the column BUKRS of ZTABLE because the source is the key column BUKRS of BKPF.

Is there a way to avoid the warning without using ##NULL_VALUES?

In what situation is the warning not sent with INSERT ztable FROM ( SELECT ... )?

Thank you.

Sandra

ABAP release: 7.58.

entry.title: Not able to insert/delete records in database table
entry.content: Executing "DELETE <dbtab>" from "SELECT" violates transactional contract "READ". getting this error when trying to delete entries from a custom database table in an unmanaged query class implementation.

entry.title: Personalization in sap mdg ui customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I just want to know how to create the personalization in sap mdg ui for customer screen.

On top of it, I would like to know how to bring the below settings so that the list of blocks are visible for the individual user.

Thanks in advance.

 

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: GOS attachment BADI implement GOS_SRV_SELECT
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I am trying to implement badi GOS_SRV_SELECT.  After Badi implimenting and save active successfully completed I got status runtime behaviour "Implementation will not be called" and BADI automatically inactive.

Please help.

 

Pradip Patel

entry.title: Update Address of SalesOrder Partnerfunction
entry.content:
Hi, 

we are currently working on a migration to an S4 Hana System (onPromise).

To implement a special business process, I need to change an address of a partner(function) of an existing salesorder. 
With the old SAP ERP System I used the BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE for this. 
To familiarise myself with new tools, I would like to solve this with RAP. 
I have implemented i_salesordertp and can e.g. change the customer number of the partner.
But how can I change the address of theses customer / salesorder partner function?

Is it even possible?
Or how can I solve this alternatively?

Thanks and best regards,
Helge

entry.title: Cds Documentation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am unable to find the documentation for the following CDS views in the S/4HANA 1809 section:

I_PurchaseOrder
I_PurchaseOrderItem
I_Supplier
I_Customer
I_Product
I_Stock
I_Material
I_Movement
I_ProfitCenter
I_GLAccountLineItem
I_SalesAnalysis
I_Project
I_ProjectNetwork
I_SalesCondition

If I check the CDS views at this link, not all the standard CDS views are documented like the ones mentioned above
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ee6ff9b281d8448f96b4fe6c89f2bdc8/8573b810511948c8a99c0672abc159aa.html?locale=en-US&version=1809.latest

Does anyone know how to perform a more in-depth search or where I can find official documentation for these views?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to run BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC without commit?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

How to run BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC without commit?

Or mb there is another fm/bapi for delivery split?

entry.title: Issue with Displaying Sub-Screen Data After Posting in MIGO_GR (SAP ABAP)
entry.content: I am working on MIGO_GR and need to enter data in a sub-screen. When I click the Post button for Goods Receipt, the entered data should be displayed in Display mode after posting. However, I am struggling to find the right trigger point to ensure the data is retained and displayed correctly.

entry.title: Getting the name and values of a data structure
entry.content:
Hi all,

(Using SAP ABAP 7.50)
Is there any way that I can, programmatically, get the name and value of each element of a data structure?
What I would like to do is something like the following pseudo code:

TYPES:
BEGIN OF ty_data,
  var1 TYPE string,
  var2 TYPE string,
  var3 type string,
END of ty_data.

DATA ls_struct type gty_data.

data(ls_list) = <Get ls_struct list of elements and values>.

Loop at LS_LIST.
  data(var_name)  = <var name of ls_list>.
  data(var_value) = <value (content) of ls_list>.
Endloop.

Thanks in advance,

Luis

entry.title: Enable Joule for on-prem ABAP Development
entry.content:
Can Joule be enabled for on-prem ADT ABAP project development for AI Coding Assistance? We are running the newest available version of on-premise S/4 HANA (2023 FSP02 instance). The AI Core set-up guide & Launchpad provisioning guide are a great start but I am missing how the on-premise system enables Joule after the cloud connector is established. 

SAP Note 3513374 mentions the possibility to integrate with SAP_BASIS 756 and up. However, after setting up AI Core and Launchpad - I cannot locate any documentation on how to complete the integration for on-prem systems. 

Our objective is to have Joule enabled from our ADT development environment. Joule is currently not recognized as enabled.

 

The Generative AI in ABAP Cloud Docs only mention validity for Public Cloud & BTP ABAP. Subsequent guides require establishing communication system and communication arrangement configuration, which I do not think that our on-prem system has the ability to configure.

What are the final steps to enable the Joule code assistant in an on-premise S/4 HANA system?

__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: RFC BAPI list of string for trial account
entry.content:
I am using aBAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022, SP01. Also, I am using SAP logon 7.40.

I want to create a RFC BAPI source code to return a list of Strings.

As much as I try, it seems that I am not allowed. Could you confirm me that is not possible?

Thanks

#abap_trial

entry.title: functional specification
entry.content: Good afternoon, I am having difficulty understanding the functional specifications and therefore I am unable to progress in my learning. I work as an ABAP trainee and I need to learn the specifications faster. Could you provide ideas, tips, websites, courses and blogs where I can practice more and understand the functional specifications?

entry.title: Need to extract HR W2 forms (ECC) as .pdf files
entry.content: Requirements is to extract W2 forms for archiving purposes (as pdf files) in ECC environment. Since this is transactional data and form is created via PC00_M10_ONW2, I am looking for suggestions on how to approach writing the ABAP program for this.

entry.title: Attachments service on S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using the GET API from the attachment service API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to retrieve attachments from a work order in the S4 public cloud environment. I provide the parameters DocumentInfoRecordDocType, DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion, DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber, and DocumentInfoRecordDocPart. Although I get a response but it only includes the attachmentcontenthash, the Content field in the response is not being populated. Anyone has an idea how to convert this SHA256 value to Base64 or XSTRING?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to add a field documentation in a custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to add in some field documentation into a custom analytical query report but failing to find any documentation on how to do this. Please see image below which shows what happens when I right-click => More field help. 

This is powered by a custom CDS view and please see the reference below for the field and annotations.

The label annotation is working but the quick info is not at the moment.

 

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

@EndUserText.label: 'Not Invoiced Amount'

@EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Quick Info'

NetUnitPrice * (cast(RequestedQuantity as abap.int8) - cast((case when _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty is null then 0 else _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty end) as abap.int8)) as NotInvoicedAmount,

entry.title: BSP lost data in the events
entry.content:
Hi

I have 1 internal table on the page of the bsp, and a pushbotton (GeraProj) to execute a code with some commands.

The internal table is filled with a select on the OnCreat and it is shown allowing to change some cells of the grid.

But now the problem was that the user needs to click on the pushbotton (GeraProj) to execute the command by the 'OnInputProcessing' event, the internal table is empty. All the data that he changed is lost.

Can someone suggest me how to trigger the events to avoid this problem?

OnCreate:
SELECT * FROM ZPST00001_PERTMP

THE SCREEN:

 


INTO TABLE gt_zpst00001_pertmp
WHERE project_definition = gs_tmp-project_definition
AND uname = gs_tmp-uname.

OnInputProcessing:
...
CASE event_id.
WHEN 'proj'.
gv_perproj = perproj.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM TCJ41 TO @DATA(LS_TCJ41)
WHERE PROFIDPROJ = @GV_perproj.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
MOVE-MATCHING LS_TCJ41 TO gs_zpst00001_proj.
gs_zpst00001_proj-zpspid = project.
gs_zpst00001_proj-pspid = project.
gs_zpst00001_proj-profl = gv_perproj.
gs_zpst00001_proj-pwhie = ls_tcj41-waers.
....

Attribute:
gt_zpst00001_pertmp TYPE ZPSTT00001_PERTMP

Layout:
<input type="submit" value="GeraProj" name="oninputprocessing(proj)"
style="border: 1px solid #000000; width:150px; height:30px; font-size:15px;"
onclick="Save();"/>
.....
<%
data : ref iterator type for ZCL_ITERATOR_PST.
create iterator object.
%>
<htmlb:gridLayout columnSize = "10"
rowSize = "2"
cellSpacing = "5"
width = "70%"
style = "TRANSPARENT" />
<%-- <htmlb:document disableBackspaceNavigation = "TRUE" />--%>
<htmlb:tableView id = "tv1"
visibleRowCount = "10"
selectionMode = "MULTILINEEDIT"
allRowsEditable = "true"
design = "ALTERNATING"
onRowSelection = "MyEventRowSelection"
table = "<%=gt_zpst00001_pertmp%>"
width = "100%"
iterator = "<%=iterator%>"
onHeaderClick = "onHeaderClick" />

</htmlb:form>

entry.title: Alternatives for tcode SCOV
entry.content:
Hello, is there a tcode like SCOV where I can check the skipped line of program and unused variables in 1 run

The SCOV is highlighting the skipped line of codes and unused variable, but I am not allowed to get an access for that tcode. Is there a tcode with almost same functionality of SCOV?

I also want to know if the program checks the line of codes without doing debug like this

entry.title: edit xlsm file and keep macro
entry.content:
I have xlsm file that I want to fill but keep the macro which is inside file already.

I have abap2xlsx library on my system, but it deletes macro anyway. Any help would be useful.

entry.title: CDS Table Function cannot be activated ("renamed"?) after deleting/recreating it
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to activate a Z-custom CDS Table Function and I get this error message:

DDL view ZZZ cannot be renamed as (DDL source ZZZ is active) (DDLS 534)

(German: Ddl-View ZZZ kann nicht nach umbenannt werden, Ddl Src ZZZ ist aktiv)

Note that between "renamed as" and parenthesis, there's no name!!

It's probably related to what I did just before:

  1. I created ZZZ and activated ZZZ successfully. It was assigned to a Z package and a transport request.
  2. Because I wanted to investigate another way, I created ZZZ_2, activated it. It was also assigned to a Z package and a transport request.
  3. Because ZZZ_2 solution was better, I deleted ZZZ and copied ZZZ_2 to ZZZ.
  4. I tried to activate ZZZ and the error happened.
  5. Note that I never released nor transported the transport request.
  6. I deleted ZZZ_2, but still ZZZ could not be activated.
  7. I tried the transaction SDDLAR (among attemps, one option was running the program RUTDDLSACT), the program RUTDDLSDEL, but nothing worked.

I feel that's a bug, probably I should report it to SAP Support.

Any idea to bypass the error?

Thank you.

Sandra

NB: No SAP note found. My system: ABAP 7.58 SP 01 (ABAP PLATFORM 2023 SP 01 (02/2024))
